title: Retrieving Item Updates causes Internal Server Error

posts.author: little_bobby_tables (Bobby)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

When trying to retrieve item updates for a board we are getting an internal server error back. The status page say no problems so is this just my instance or happening for others?

Stripped back query that caused error:

query {
  boards(limit: 1) {
    items_page(limit: 20) {
      cursor
      items {
        id
        updates {
          id
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

Cheers.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @little_bobby_tables,

Just FYI, I changed the category of your post so it is in the apps & developers section of the community.

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: little_bobby_tables (Bobby)
posts.cookedHtml: Seems to be back to normal this morning. False alarm?

posts.author: aholtzhauer (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m still having this issue. Getting anything over 35, 40 causes it to crash out. Back in version 2024-10 we could request 300 with no issue, and according to the documentation over 1000 should be allowed? No idea why this is happening but it’s frustrating.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: @aholtzhauer I see you opened a new thread about that. I will move any replies there!
